selections.name: Centenary Florin
selections.reason: Classy filly with proven form, including a strong 3rd at Flemington. Gets a good draw and should be hard to beat.

selections.name: Stellar Cipher
selections.reason: Top connections with Waller and Williams. Showed ability in Listed company last prep and looks a major threat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Nitro Sonic
selections.reason: Track and distance winner who broke through here last start. Gets an ideal inside barrier to utilize momentum.

selections.name: Alpine Point
selections.reason: Unexposed elite profile from the Hayes yard with Zahra aboard. Must be respected on debut despite the tricky gate.

danger_horse.name: Ko Phangan
danger_horse.reason: Strips fitter second-up after a solid run at Caulfield. Can improve in this easier grade.

selections.name: Blue Shield
selections.reason: Consistent gelding from the Price/Kent yard. Has been close in both starts and gets a great chance to break through here.

selections.name: Lotta City
selections.reason: Showed affinity for this track with a strong 2nd here last start. Well drawn to get an economical run.

selections.name: Alphabet
selections.reason: Solid form including a narrow 2nd at Sale. Freedman trained and should be right in the finish with luck from the draw.

selections.name: Mission Of Joy
selections.reason: Resuming after a good debut 2nd at this track. Talented filly but will need a smart ride from the wide barrier.

danger_horse.name: Calexpo
danger_horse.reason: First starter from the Hayes yard with Zahra riding. Trialling well and could surprise on debut.

selections.name: Conflict
selections.reason: Drops in class and gets a perfect inside draw. Moody/Coleman and Nolen combination is lethal. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Soju
selections.reason: Solid form in Metro company including a 4th at Caulfield. Well drawn and reaches peak fitness third-up.

selections.name: Cavalry Girl
selections.reason: Classy filly with a 2nd at Caulfield last start. Carries weight and a wide draw, but raw ability keeps her in the mix.

selections.name: Killiana
selections.reason: Consistent type from the Hayes stable. Narrowly beaten at Sale and will give a sight if she can cross from the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Next Step Iowa
danger_horse.reason: Strong first-up winner at Pakenham. Faces a tough draw but has the momentum to feature.

selections.name: Satin Diva
selections.reason: Maher-trained filly dropping back from Metro grade. Gets a great inside draw and should be very hard to hold out.

selections.name: Meisho
selections.reason: Track and distance winner who broke through here last start. Perfectly drawn to repeat the dose.

selections.name: Chisholm
selections.reason: Another track winner who scored impressively here fresh. Drawn slightly wide but has the tactical speed to overcome it.

selections.name: Zourosa
selections.reason: Speedy galloper coming off a win at Bendigo. Drawn well and will be prominent for a long way.

danger_horse.name: Logam
danger_horse.reason: Promising type with blinkers added. Gets the inside run and can measure up.

selections.name: Delicate Lady
selections.reason: Excellent form profile with a narrow 2nd at Caulfield last start. Gets a perfect draw and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Electric Star
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a strong win at Caulfield. Wide draw is a slight concern but form is impeccable.

selections.name: Rich Dottie
selections.reason: Classy mare who ran 3rd at Caulfield fresh. Boxed on well and will strip fitter here.

selections.name: Reina Isabella
selections.reason: Consistent type who gets a great inside draw. Can improve sharply on rain-affected ground if it eventuates.

danger_horse.name: Royal Lass
danger_horse.reason: Drops in class after tackling Metro company. Well drawn and capable of a bold showing.

selections.name: Cat Noir
selections.reason: Strong Metro form including a 3rd at Sandown. Gets a great draw and looks perfectly placed in this grade.

selections.name: The Devil In Her
selections.reason: Solid 4th at Caulfield last start. Drawn beautifully to get an economical run and will be strong late.

selections.name: Aristonous
selections.reason: Consistent gelding coming off a narrow 2nd at Pakenham. Competitive of late and commands respect.

selections.name: Princing
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and won well at Geelong last start. Gets the inside barrier to dictate terms.

danger_horse.name: Calypso King
danger_horse.reason: Narrowly beaten at Geelong last start. Drawn well and can measure up with the right run.

selections.name: Glenfinnan
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd at Caulfield last start in stronger company. Ready to peak and looks the standout class runner.

selections.name: Almairac
selections.reason: Solid 4th at Sandown last start. Overdue for a win and finds a very suitable assignment here.

selections.name: My Roca Fella
selections.reason: Flying at present with a strong win at Pakenham last start. Will take catching if he gets his own way.

selections.name: Amleto
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran 3rd behind My Roca Fella last start. Wide draw is a slight negative but has claims.

danger_horse.name: Gates
danger_horse.reason: Drops back from Metro grade. Gets a great inside draw and can turn his form around.

selections.name: Brandjam
selections.reason: Strong 2nd at Caulfield last start. Drops in grade and despite the wide draw, possesses the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Stay Humble
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd at Sandown before a break. Drawn perfectly and has a strong fresh record.

selections.name: Zamparini Spirit
selections.reason: Track and distance winner who scored impressively here last start. Maps well and can repeat.

selections.name: Flying Mikki
selections.reason: Won well at Sale last start. Gets a great inside draw and has the momentum to feature.

danger_horse.name: Jewel Bay
danger_horse.reason: First-up winner at Cranbourne. Tricky wide gate but has the ability to figure if the breaks come.
